zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas III de Bruyères於1200年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌布盧艾雷勒-a特爾時，他的父親Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèves21歲，母親Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtel15歲。他於1235年與Agnès de Beaumont du Gatinais在法國瑟-吉馬內波奧蒙吉-a迪乃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1251年10月24日享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas III de Bruyères于1200年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌布盧艾雷勒-a特爾时，他的父亲Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèves21岁，母亲Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtel15岁。他于1235年与Agnès de Beaumont du Gatinais在法国瑟-吉馬內波奧蒙吉-a迪乃斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1251年10月24日享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bruyères
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Fernand, Jacques, Marcel.

French (Bruyère): from Old French bruiere ‘heather’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France (for example in Calvados) named with this word. Compare Labruyere .
Altered form (Bruyère) of French Bruguier: habitational name from (Le) Bruguier, the name of several places in the southeastern part of France, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Labruyere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jean-Philippe.

French (Labruyère): variant, with fused feminine definite article la, of Bruyère ‘heather’ (see Bruyere 1), a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France named La Bruyère.
Altered form (Labruyère) of French Labrière, a cognate of 1 above (see Labrier ).

variants.name: Briere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Pierre, Adrien, Aurele, Benedicte, Benoit, Colette, Fernand, Gaston, Marcel, Micheline.

French (Brière): topographic name from a regional variant of Old French bruiere ‘heather’ (see Bruyere ), or a habitational name from La Brière, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France, from the same word.
History: Jean Brière from Clarbec in Calvados, France, married Jeanne Grandin in Quebec City, QC, in 1671.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas III de Bruyères was born in 1200, in Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, his father, Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèves, was 21 and his mother, Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtel, was 15. He married Agnès de Beaumont du Gatinais in 1235, in Beaumont-en-Gâtinais, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 24 October 1251, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas III de Bruyères est né en 1200, à Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèves, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtel, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Beaumont du Gatinais en 1235, à Beaumont-en-Gâtinais, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1251, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas III de Bruyères 1200 in Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèves 21 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtel 15. Er hat 1235 in Beaumont-en-Gâtinais, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Agnès de Beaumont du Gatinais geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Oktober 1251 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas III de Bruyères è nato il nel 1200 nel Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèves, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtel, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Beaumont du Gatinais nel 1235, nel Beaumont-en-Gâtinais, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 ottobre 1251, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas III de Bruyèresが1200年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンブルイeレス-レ-チaテルで生まれた時，父Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèvesは21歳，母Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtelは15歳であった。1235年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンビーウモント-エン-グaティナイスでAgnès de Beaumont du Gatinaisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1251年10月24日に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas III de Bruyères(이)가 1200년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 브루이e레스-레-cha텔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèves(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtel(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1235년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 보몽--그a틴아이에서 Agnès de Beaumont du Gatinais(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1251년 10월 24일 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas III de Bruyères nasceu em 1200, em Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèves, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtel, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Beaumont du Gatinais em 1235, em Beaumont-en-Gâtinais, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1251, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas III de Bruyères родился в 1200 г. в местности бруиeрес-ле-чaтел, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèves было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtel, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Beaumont du Gatinais в 1235 г. в местности бомонт-ен-гaтинеи, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 октября 1251 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas III de Bruyères nació en 1200, en Bruyères-le-Châtel, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gaucelin VII de  Lèves, Seigneur de Lèves, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bruyères-le-Châtel, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Agnès de Beaumont du Gatinais en 1235, en Beaumont-en-Gâtinais, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1251, a la edad de 51 años.
